ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the participant */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the participant */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "email_address" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animals" (
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal */,
  "animal_name" TEXT /* Name of the animal */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the animal */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the animal */,
  "vaccination_records" TEXT /* Vaccination records of the animal */,
  "health_certificates" TEXT /* Health certificates of the animal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the participants table */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the events table */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the registrations table */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the event_classes table */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the awards table */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the participant in the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)
column_names: Date of birth of the participant
Date of birth of the animal
Foreign key referencing the participants table
Foreign key referencing the events table
Foreign key referencing the registrations table
Foreign key referencing the event_classes table
Foreign key referencing the awards table
Ranking of the participant in the class
